examples_json: [{"en":"I always brush my teeth before bed.","zh":"我睡前总是刷牙。"}]
[{"en":"I usually have breakfast at 8.","zh":"我通常8点吃早餐。"}]
[{"en":"I often read before bed.","zh":"我经常睡前看书。"}]
[{"en":"Sometimes I go jogging.","zh":"我有时去慢跑。"}]
[{"en":"I never smoke.","zh":"我从不抽烟。"}]
[{"en":"I want to develop a good habit.","zh":"我想养成一个好习惯。"}]
[{"en":"I admire your discipline.","zh":"我佩服你的自律。"}]
[{"en":"Reading helps me relax.","zh":"阅读帮助我放松。"}]
[{"en":"I never skip breakfast.","zh":"我从不跳过早餐。"}]

description: 最高程度。修饰形容词或副词。
examples_json: [{"en":"She is very smart.","zh":"她非常聪明。"}]
[{"en":"The movie is quite good.","zh":"这部电影相当不错。"}]
[{"en":"It's rather cold today.","zh":"今天挺冷的。"}]
[{"en":"That's extremely kind of you.","zh":"你真是太善良了。"}]
[{"en":"This coffee is too hot.","zh":"这咖啡太烫了。"}]
[{"en":"The scenery is very beautiful.","zh":"景色非常美。"}]
[{"en":"The trail is quite steep.","zh":"这条路挺陡的。"}]
[{"en":"We finally reached the summit.","zh":"我们终于到达了山顶。"}]
[{"en":"The view is absolutely breathtaking.","zh":"景色绝对令人叹为观止。"}]
[{"en":"Please read the instructions carefully.","zh":"请仔细阅读说明。"}]
[{"en":"He quickly finished his homework.","zh":"他快速完成了作业。"}]
[{"en":"The children played happily.","zh":"孩子们快乐地玩耍。"}]
[{"en":"She easily solved the problem.","zh":"她轻松地解决了问题。"}]
[{"en":"She speaks English well.","zh":"她英语说得很好。"}]
[{"en":"I read the recipe carefully.","zh":"我仔细看了食谱。"}]
[{"en":"Prepare all ingredients quickly.","zh":"快速准备好所有食材。"}]
[{"en":"Chop the garlic carefully.","zh":"小心地切大蒜。"}]
[{"en":"Stir the sauce constantly.","zh":"不断地搅拌酱汁。"}]
[{"en":"The flavors blend together well.","zh":"味道融合得很好。"}]

description: 表达幸运。放句首修饰全句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Luckily no one was hurt.","zh":"幸运的是没人受伤。"}]
[{"en":"Frankly I don't care.","zh":"坦白说我不在乎。"}]
[{"en":"Honestly that's the best option.","zh":"老实说那是最好的选择。"}]
[{"en":"Surprisingly he agreed with us.","zh":"令人惊讶的是他同意了我们。"}]
[{"en":"Obviously she was lying.","zh":"显然她在撒谎。"}]
[{"en":"Someone accused her of lying.","zh":"有人指责她说谎。"}]
[{"en":"Obviously she is innocent.","zh":"显然她是无辜的。"}]
[{"en":"Someone leaked the data.","zh":"有人泄露了数据。"}]
[{"en":"Luckily she got promoted.","zh":"幸运的是她升职了。"}]
